items.title: Gas and oil prices soar and shares tumble as crucial shipping lane threatened
items.description: Iranian official threatens to "set fire" to any ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Haaland? Kane? R9? Picking the best centre-forwards this century
items.description: Who are the best centre-forwards of the 21st Century? We've had a go at trying to whittle down a pretty formidable list.

items.title: Fin Smith set to start as Borthwick shakes up England
items.description: England's entire backline could change from the game against Ireland for the Six Nations match in Italy on Saturday.

items.title: England have better spinners and can beat India in semi-final - Vaughan
items.description: Former England captain Michael Vaughan says England have a better spin attack than India and he has a "funny feeling" Harry Brook's side will win Thur...

items.title: Barbican's £231m revamp plans given the go-ahead
items.description: The London arts centre is to get new lifts and will have step-free access throughout the venue.
